name: Peaches'n Crean Oven-Puffed Pancake
recipeIngredient: 2 eggs beaten OR 1/2 cup egg substitute thawed
16 oz (400g) can sliced peaches in extra light syrup, drained, reserving 3 TB liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C).
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, salt, milk and eggs. Beat with a wire whisk or rotary beater until smooth.
3. Place margarine in a 9-inch pie pan; melt in the preheated oven for 2 to 4 minutes or just until it sizzles.
4. Remove the pan from the oven; tilt to coat the bottom with melted butter. Immediately pour batter into hot pan; top with peach slices, pecans and cinnamon.
5. Bake for 16 to 20 minutes or until puffed and golden brown.
6. Meanwhile, in a small bowl, combine all cream sauce ingredients; mix well.
7. Cut pancake into wedges. Serve immediately with cream sauce.
